vocab.meaning: một kênh giải tỏa sức sáng tạo
vocab.example: Drawing serves as a vital creative outlet for me, allowing me to express complex emotions that words often fail to capture.

vocab.meaning: có tính trị liệu và làm dịu tâm hồn
vocab.example: I find the process of sketching incredibly therapeutic and soul-soothing after a grueling day at work.

vocab.meaning: mài giũa kỹ năng nghệ thuật
vocab.example: I try to practice daily to hone my artistic skills, specifically focusing on mastering light and shadow.

vocab.meaning: đắm chìm/mê mải vào thứ gì đó
vocab.example: Whenever I pick up a pencil, I tend to lose myself in the details of the canvas, completely oblivious to the passage of time.

vocab.meaning: khả năng quan sát chi tiết tốt
vocab.example: Drawing has helped me develop an eye for detail, making me much more observant of the world around me.

vocab.meaning: sức hấp dẫn về mặt thẩm mỹ
vocab.example: I am particularly drawn to minimalist sketches because of their clean lines and profound aesthetic appeal.

vocab.meaning: gợi lên cảm giác hoài cổ
vocab.example: I love drawing old buildings as they often evoke a sense of nostalgia for a bygone era.

vocab.meaning: một cảm giác đạt được thành tựu sâu sắc
vocab.example: Completing a detailed portrait gives me a profound sense of accomplishment that boosts my confidence.
Drawing provides a blank canvas for me to unleash my imagination without any boundaries or constraints.
Although I wasn't born with much natural artistic flair, I’ve improved significantly through sheer persistence and practice.
